meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve can't finish projects (Beginner Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome can't finish projects. A Beginner-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity Project Template to Finish Apps
content.seo_description: Stop stalling on freelance projects. Learn how to use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to ship your SaaS builds faster than ever before.
content.answer_block: The Antigravity project template eliminates decision paralysis by providing a standardized, production-ready architecture. By pairing this scaffold with Claude Code, you automate boilerplate generation and complex logic implementation. This workflow allows you to shift from 'stuck' to 'shipped' in hours, ensuring consistent project delivery and higher client satisfaction.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a blank IDE, the cursor blinking in rhythm with your mounting anxiety. Another project, another 'In Progress' folder gathering digital dust. The gap between your technical ambition and your shipping velocity is killing your freelance business, leaving you exhausted and underpaid.

But the best builders don't write from scratch—they curate. By leveraging the Antigravity project template and the raw power of Claude Code, you can bypass the tedious scaffolding phase. This isn't just about writing code; it's about building a repeatable machine that turns client requirements into deployed reality with surgical precision.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish a robust foundation by cloning the Antigravity template, which includes pre-configured linting, testing, and deployment workflows.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project using the standard Antigravity SaaS boilerplate, including authentication, database schema, and responsive UI components.

steps.title: Define Domain Models
steps.description: Translate client requirements into actionable data structures to ensure the database schema aligns perfectly with the application logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create Prisma models for a project management dashboard, including Users, Projects, and Tasks with enforced relational integrity.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write 'Define Prisma schema for project management'

steps.title: Implement API Endpoints
steps.description: Automate the creation of secure, type-safe API routes that handle CRUD operations without manual boilerplate.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate secure API endpoints for Task management, ensuring all requests are validated against the user session.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write 'Create CRUD API for Tasks using Antigravity patterns'

steps.title: Build UI Components
steps.description: Generate high-fidelity UI components based on the Antigravity design system, ensuring consistency across the entire application.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Build a responsive Task List component with filtering capabilities using Tailwind CSS and Antigravity UI primitives.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write 'Create TaskList component with Tailwind styles'

steps.title: Automated Testing & Deployment
steps.description: Run the integrated test suite and prepare the application for deployment to ensure it is production-ready.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Execute unit tests for all new API routes and verify the build process for production deployment.

pro_tips: Always use a 'Context File' to store project requirements, allowing Claude Code to reference the big picture during every task.
Prioritize the 'Happy Path' first; automate the main user flow before adding edge-case error handling.
Use Antigravity’s built-in hooks to inject custom middleware, keeping your business logic clean and decoupled.
Review Claude Code’s proposed file changes in the diff view before accepting to maintain your mental model of the codebase.
Treat your project template as a living document; update your Antigravity scaffold every time you solve a recurring bug.
resources: The Freelancer's Guide to AI: https://ai-builder.community/guide
content.next_steps: After completing this project, create a 'Golden Image' of your current repo to use as a custom template for your next three client projects.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting projects stall and start shipping with the professional rigor your clients expect. By mastering this flow, you reclaim your time and scale your freelance revenue. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
